module_info.docstring:
Tests for the Git archive browser and visualization routes.

Tests all /mail/archive/* endpoints for proper rendering and functionality.

functions.name: _get_git_head_sha
functions.docstring: Get the HEAD SHA from a git repository (synchronous helper).

functions.name: _setup_archive_with_commits
functions.docstring: Create test archive with commits for visualization tests.

functions.name: test_archive_guide
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/guide returns guide page.

functions.name: test_archive_activity
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/activity returns recent commits.

functions.name: test_archive_activity_with_limit
functions.docstring: Test activity view with limit parameter.

functions.name: test_archive_commit_detail
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/commit/{sha} returns commit detail.

functions.name: test_archive_commit_short_sha
functions.docstring: Test commit detail with short SHA.

functions.name: test_archive_commit_invalid_sha
functions.docstring: Test commit detail with invalid SHA.

functions.name: test_archive_commit_nonexistent_sha
functions.docstring: Test commit detail with nonexistent but valid-format SHA.

functions.name: test_archive_timeline
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/timeline returns timeline visualization.

functions.name: test_archive_browser
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/browser returns directory browser.

functions.name: test_archive_browser_file_content
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/browser/{project}/file returns file content.

functions.name: test_archive_browser_file_nonexistent
functions.docstring: Test file browser with nonexistent file.

functions.name: test_archive_browser_path_traversal_prevention
functions.docstring: Test that path traversal attempts are blocked.

functions.name: test_archive_network
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/network returns agent communication graph.

functions.name: test_archive_network_empty
functions.docstring: Test network graph with no messages.

functions.name: test_archive_time_travel_page
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/time-travel returns time travel interface.

functions.name: test_archive_time_travel_snapshot
functions.docstring: Test GET /mail/archive/time-travel/snapshot returns historical inbox.

functions.name: test_archive_time_travel_snapshot_invalid_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test time travel with invalid timestamp.

functions.name: test_archive_time_travel_snapshot_past_timestamp
functions.docstring: Test time travel with timestamp before any commits.

functions.name: test_archive_routes_no_projects
functions.docstring: Test archive routes when no projects exist.

functions.name: test_archive_commit_xss_in_sha
functions.docstring: Test that XSS in SHA parameter is escaped.
